record.summary: The minimal frontend: a Vue 3 + Vite SPA (login, OIDC callback handoff, /me, logout) built from frontend/ into backend/web/dist, and the `web` Encore service that serves the built bundle as static files from the app's own origin. No separate frontend host: the same container serves UI, API, and IdP.
record.title: Minimal Vue SPA served by the app itself
